# Biodegradable

**Summary**: Capable of being broken down by microorganisms.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-othman|Othman, 2023]] selected GLDA as a biodegradable chelating agent to improve environmental safety.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-othman|Othman, 2023]] Reduces the environmental impact and disposal costs of fracturing fluids.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-othman|Othman, 2023]] Based on chemical properties of GLDA.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The suggested formulation is considered eco-friendly and biodegradable. ([[2023-othman|Othman, 2023, p. 83]])
